_metadata.description: Robots in Disguise (2001) character appearances — RiD 2001 TV series

data.name: Optimus Prime (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Tall red and blue robot with fire truck elements including extendable ladders on his back and water cannon weaponry. Features a broad chest with prominent Autobot insignia and a traditional faceplate design.

data.name: Ultra Magnus (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Bulky blue and white robot with car carrier trailer elements visible on his frame. Broader and more heavily armored than his G1 counterpart, with prominent shoulder pylons.

data.name: Side Burn (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek blue robot with sports car panels forming his chest and door wings on his back. Youngest of the Autobot Brothers with a compact, agile frame and visor-style optics.

data.name: Prowl (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: White robot with police car styling and a Lamborghini-inspired alt mode. Features police light bar elements on his shoulders and a streamlined, angular frame.

data.name: X-Brawn (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Rugged green and silver robot with boxy SUV proportions. Heavyset and muscular build with oversized forearms, reflecting his role as the strongest Autobot Brother.

data.name: Railspike (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue robot with bullet train nose cone forming his chest. Tall, commanding frame as Team Bullet Train's leader with visible rail components along his limbs.

data.name: Rapid Run (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white robot with streamlined bullet train panels on his torso. Lean build with train car sections forming his lower legs.

data.name: Midnight Express (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and white robot with bullet train elements integrated into his frame. Compact build compared to his Team Bullet Train teammates.

data.name: Rail Racer (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Towering combined robot formed from Railspike, Rapid Run, and Midnight Express. Train sections visible throughout the body with Railspike forming the core torso.

data.name: Wedge (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and orange robot with bulldozer blade forming his chest plate. Compact, sturdy frame as the Build Team's enthusiastic young leader.

data.name: Grimlock (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow excavator robot with shovel arm and treads visible on his legs. Unlike his G1 namesake, this Grimlock transforms into construction equipment rather than a dinosaur.

data.name: Heavy Load (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green robot with dump truck bed folded onto his back. Stocky, powerful build with broad shoulders reflecting his role as the Build Team's heavy lifter.

data.name: Hightower (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange robot with crane arm mounted on his back. Tall, lanky frame with construction vehicle treads on his lower legs.

data.name: Landfill (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Massive combined robot formed from Wedge, Grimlock, Heavy Load, and Hightower. Construction vehicle components visible throughout with bulldozer blade on chest and crane arm on one shoulder.

data.name: Omega Prime (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Massive red, blue, and white combined super robot formed from Optimus Prime and Ultra Magnus. Fire truck and car carrier elements merge into an imposing armored frame with enhanced weaponry.

data.name: Fortress Maximus (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Colossal dark blue and red robot of immense scale, capable of transforming into a battleship and a city-fortress. Towers over all other characters with heavily armored plating and numerous weapon emplacements.

data.name: Cerebros (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Smaller blue and gray robot who serves as the head component of Fortress Maximus. Transforms into the giant robot's head module, acting as his consciousness and control center.

data.name: Hot Shot (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Red and black compact sports car robot with a bold, energetic design. Leader of the Spychangers with a small but agile frame suited for covert operations.

data.name: REV (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Red Lamborghini-styled robot with sleek supercar panels and a streamlined frame. Spychanger team member with an aerodynamic build.

data.name: Crosswise (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue concept car robot with futuristic vehicle panels and a compact Spychanger frame. Smooth, rounded design elements reflecting his concept car alt mode.

data.name: W.A.R.S. (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green NASCAR-styled robot with racing livery elements and rear spoiler visible on his back. Spychanger team member with a stocky, compact build.

data.name: Ironhide (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Black pickup truck robot with rugged, utilitarian design. Spychanger team member with a tough, no-nonsense frame and truck bed elements on his back.

data.name: Mirage (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue Indy car robot with open-wheel racing elements and aerodynamic bodywork panels. Spychanger team member with a light, speed-oriented frame.

data.name: Skid-Z (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: White F-1 race car robot with open-wheel Formula One bodywork and rear wing on his back. Sleek, aerodynamic frame with racing stripes.

data.name: Tow-Line (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red tow truck robot with towing hook arm and flatbed elements on his back. Sturdy, service-vehicle build with a law-enforcement attitude about parking violations.

data.name: T-AI (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Holographic projection of a young woman with long hair and a futuristic outfit. Appears as a translucent digital avatar coordinating Autobot operations from the base, with no physical robot mode.

data.name: Megatron (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and blue six-changer robot with prominent bat wings and dragon-head hand weapon. Imposing frame with multiple alt mode elements visible including jet wings and vehicle panels, reflecting his six transformation modes.

data.name: Galvatron (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: White, purple, and red ten-changer robot, an upgraded form of Megatron with a more regal and powerful appearance. Dragon wings and multiple vehicle elements integrated into a heavily armored frame with ten transformation modes.

data.name: Sky-Byte (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white shark robot with a distinctive shark head chest and fin-like wings enabling flight. Streamlined aquatic design with visible shark jaws and tail elements.

data.name: Dark Scream (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and black robot with flying squirrel membrane wings stretched between his arms and body. Small, nimble frame with rodent-like beast mode features and gliding capability.

data.name: Gas Skunk (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and brown robot with skunk tail and chemical spray weapon. Hunched, beast-like posture with visible skunk features including prominent tail stripe markings.

data.name: Slapper (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green toad robot with wide, squat build and extendable tongue weapon. Amphibian beast mode features visible in robot mode including bulging optics and webbed design elements.

data.name: Scourge (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Black tanker truck robot serving as a dark mirror of Optimus Prime's design. Similar body structure to Optimus but in menacing black and teal colors with a corrupted Autobot-turned-Decepticon aesthetic.

data.name: Mega-Octane (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green military transport truck robot with heavy armor plating. Large, commanding frame as the Commandos team leader with visible truck cab chest and military vehicle elements.

data.name: Ro-Tor (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green helicopter robot with rotor blades mounted on his back and tail boom elements on his limbs. Aerial combat design with a compact, flight-capable frame.

data.name: Movor (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue and purple space shuttle robot with shuttle wings folded on his back and orbital vehicle nosecone on his chest. Sleek, aerospace-styled frame.

data.name: Armorhide (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Tan and brown tank robot with turret cannon mounted on his shoulder and heavy treads on his legs. Squat, heavily armored frame built for ground assault.

data.name: Rollbar (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and brown jeep robot with off-road vehicle elements including roll cage visible on his torso. Rugged, military scout build with all-terrain design features.

data.name: Ruination (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Towering combined military robot formed from Mega-Octane, Ro-Tor, Movor, Armorhide, and Rollbar. Military vehicle components visible throughout with helicopter rotors, tank treads, and shuttle wings creating a bristling war machine.

data.name: Koji Onishi (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Young Japanese boy with spiky dark hair, typically wearing a red and white jacket over casual clothes. Primary human ally of the Autobots with a close bond to Optimus Prime.

data.name: Dr. Onishi (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Middle-aged Japanese man with glasses and neat dark hair, usually in professional attire. Archaeologist and father of Koji whose research knowledge makes him a target for the Predacons.

data.name: Kelly (RiD 2001 Cartoon)
data.description: Young woman with red hair, frequently seen in professional or casual outfits. Recurring comic relief character whose red sports cars are constantly destroyed in Transformer battles.
